sections.treatment: Centered decision lane cut by one vertical identity rule
sections.primaryMedia: Google identity confirmation, profile choice, runtime truth, and workspace create/join progression
sections.interactionModel: A linear keyboard-complete sequence with Back, explicit selected state, and no workspace fetch before runtime choice
sections.motionTimeline: Current step settles once; progress rule advances; reduced motion swaps instantly
failureConditions: Profile choice appears to grant authority
Fake sign-in or Cloud readiness is shown

sections.treatment: Open reading plane anchored by a persistent bottom composer
sections.primaryMedia: User and agent messages, attachments, provider/runtime/autonomy state, and thread history
sections.interactionModel: New thread, select history, compose, attach, choose governed run controls, Send, Stop, retry, fork, or continue
sections.motionTimeline: Message settles, streaming text updates without layout jumps, composer changes Send to Stop
failureConditions: Composer is displaced by secondary controls
Provider or runtime truth is hidden

sections.treatment: Cobalt route spine with a copper human-decision gate
sections.primaryMedia: Plan, Work, Approval, and Result stages connected to selected artifacts and evidence
sections.interactionModel: Select a stage, inspect evidence, approve or reject when authorized, stop or retry from typed recovery states
sections.motionTimeline: Route advances only on persisted events; copper pauses at approval; result resolves without celebratory motion
failureConditions: Every stage is rendered as a generic card

sections.treatment: Time ruler joined to calendar and execution ledger
sections.primaryMedia: Upcoming runs, recurrence preview, readiness, last/next execution, and recovery history
sections.interactionModel: Create, preview, save, pause, resume, run now, cancel, retry, and inspect an immutable authorization snapshot
sections.motionTimeline: Time cursor updates discretely; status changes announce; no ambient calendar animation
failureConditions: Timezone or missed-run policy is hidden
Run now can duplicate a confirmed effect
Schedules become a repeated card grid

sections.treatment: Indexed settings document beside a health-and-permissions ledger
sections.primaryMedia: Scoped settings, provider/MCP/integration health, vault references, policy locks, and truthful billing placeholder
sections.interactionModel: Navigate scope, edit typed values, save, test, reconnect, revoke, and inspect enforced policy
sections.motionTimeline: Changed fields mark quietly; save status announces; reconnect progress remains local to the row
failureConditions: Lower scope can override team policy

sections.treatment: Assignment lanes intersecting a review queue and immutable activity rail
sections.primaryMedia: Assignments, comments, mentions, presence, approval inbox, roles, and audit-linked activity
sections.interactionModel: Invite, assign, comment, mention, watch, review, approve, and switch workspaces through server-returned capabilities
sections.motionTimeline: Presence updates fade without reordering work; new activity is announced but does not steal focus

sections.treatment: Device-to-control-plane topology with explicit readiness and recovery checkpoints
sections.primaryMedia: Paired local nodes, runtime placement policy, E2B lifecycle, heartbeats, capability mismatch, and cleanup state
sections.interactionModel: Pair, select placement, authorize fallback, wake, retry, cancel, and inspect node/sandbox health
sections.motionTimeline: Topology pulses only for a real heartbeat; lifecycle transitions step discretely; reduced motion uses text and shape
failureConditions: Fallback changes authority or credential context silently
Cloud is labeled ready before lifecycle gates pass
